creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Ok, you asked it yourself ;)

# whoami
root
# poudriere ports -u
(security/libssh2 is now as committed by youself)
# poudriere testport -j j13 -v -i -o security/libssh2
...
Entering interactive test mode. Type 'exit' when done.
(now we are inside the jail of poudriere with libssh2 built
and ready for tests)
root@j13-default:~ # cd /usr/ports/security/libssh2
root@j13-default:~ # make test
===>  Testing for libssh2-1.10.0,3
Making check in src
Making check in tests
Making check in ossfuzz
/usr/bin/make  simple
cc -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I../src  -I../src -I../include -I../src  -DNDEBUG  -O2 -pipe  -fstack-protector-strong -fno-strict-aliasing -MT simple.o -MD -MP -MF .deps/simple.Tpo -c -o simple.o simple.c
mv -f .deps/simple.Tpo .deps/simple.Po
/bin/sh ../libtool  --tag=CC    --mode=link cc  -O2 -pipe  -fstack-protector-strong -fno-strict-aliasing   -fstack-protector-strong -o simple simple.o ../src/libssh2.la -lssl -lcrypto
libtool: link: cc -O2 -pipe -fstack-protector-strong -fno-strict-aliasing -fstack-protector-strong -o .libs/simple simple.o  ../src/.libs/libssh2.so -lssl -lcrypto -Wl,-rpath -Wl,/usr/local/lib
/usr/bin/make  check-TESTS
PASS: simple
PASS: mansyntax.sh
FAIL: ssh2.sh
============================================================================
Testsuite summary for libssh2 -
============================================================================
# TOTAL: 3
# PASS:  2
# SKIP:  0
# XFAIL: 0
# FAIL:  1
# XPASS: 0
# ERROR: 0
============================================================================
See tests/test-suite.log
Please report to libssh2-devel@cool.haxx.se
============================================================================
*** Error code 1
Stop.
make[5]: stopped in /wrkdirs/usr/ports/security/libssh2/work/libssh2-1.10.0/tests
*** Error code 1
Stop.
make[4]: stopped in /wrkdirs/usr/ports/security/libssh2/work/libssh2-1.10.0/tests
*** Error code 1
Stop.
make[3]: stopped in /wrkdirs/usr/ports/security/libssh2/work/libssh2-1.10.0/tests
*** Error code 1
Stop.
make[2]: stopped in /wrkdirs/usr/ports/security/libssh2/work/libssh2-1.10.0/tests
*** Error code 1
Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /wrkdirs/usr/ports/security/libssh2/work/libssh2-1.10.0
*** Error code 1
Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/security/libssh2

(Let us have a look at details:)
root@j13-default:~ # cd /wrkdirs/usr/ports/security/libssh2/work/libssh2-1.10.0/tests
root@j13-default:~ # ./ssh2.sh
command-line line 0: Deprecated option UsePrivilegeSeparation
command-line line 0: Deprecated option UsePrivilegeSeparation
Fingerprint: 86 AD B2 21 33 60 65 3D 9A 29 86 DE 22 99 DA 18 CC BA D3 AC
Authentication methods: publickey,keyboard-interactive
        Authentication by public key failed!
(Further study shows that login of root is not allowed.)
======================================================
(Now try with added files/patch-tests_ssh2.sh as proposed by my patch:)
root@j13-default:~ # make test
===>  Testing for libssh2-1.10.0,3
Making check in src
Making check in tests
Making check in ossfuzz
/usr/bin/make  simple
cc -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I../src  -I../src -I../include -I../src  -DNDEBUG  -O2 -pipe  -fstack-protector-strong -fno-strict-aliasing -MT simple.o -MD -MP -MF .deps/simple.Tpo -c -o simple.o simple.c
mv -f .deps/simple.Tpo .deps/simple.Po
/bin/sh ../libtool  --tag=CC    --mode=link cc  -O2 -pipe  -fstack-protector-strong -fno-strict-aliasing   -fstack-protector-strong -o simple simple.o ../src/libssh2.la -lssl -lcrypto
libtool: link: cc -O2 -pipe -fstack-protector-strong -fno-strict-aliasing -fstack-protector-strong -o .libs/simple simple.o  ../src/.libs/libssh2.so -lssl -lcrypto -Wl,-rpath -Wl,/usr/local/lib
/usr/bin/make  check-TESTS
PASS: simple
PASS: mansyntax.sh
PASS: ssh2.sh
============================================================================

============================================================================
